content: The video is reportedly from an Iranian strike on a British engine oil company in Iraq's Erbil, which caused a massive fire. So far, the United States or any of its allies has not confirmed the incident.

content: Artemis 2 is the first crewed test flight of NASA’s Artemis program, which follows the Apollo missions.

content: Trump said he is open to a deal with the Islamic Republic, only to say that one was not necessary to end the war. There was also mixed messaging on whether he would insist that Iran fully reopen the Hormuz Strait to oil and other commodity shipping.

title: Asaduddin Owaisi's "Regressive Politics" Dig At Himanta Sarma At Assam Rally
content: Owaisi arrived in Assam on Wednesday ahead of the campaigning for the All India United Democratic Front (AIUDF) for the upcoming Assembly elections.

title: Delhi To Replace Over 1 Lakh Chinese CCTV Cameras Over Security Concerns
content: The Aam Aadmi Party pushed back against BJP's allegations on CCTV installations, with Delhi unit president Saurabh Bharadwaj questioning why no nationwide ban exists if the cameras pose genuine national security risks.

title: Is NATO Becoming Collateral Damage In Trump's Iran War?
content: The ire from the president -- who has also blasted NATO allies as "cowards" over Iran -- is just the latest existential crisis to grip the 77-year-old alliance since his return to power last January.

title: 'Complete breakdown of law & order in Bengal': SC after judicial officers held hostage over SIR
content: The Supreme Court has strongly condemned the hostage situation involving judicial officers in Malda, issuing showcause notices to top West Bengal officials. The court cited a "complete breakdown of law and order" and an "abdication of duty," ordering central forces deployment and allowing probes into the incident. Leaders are urged to avoid politicizing the matter.

title: Bengaluru techie dies by suicide after baby drowns in bucket
content: An eleven-month-old baby boy drowned in a bucket of water after his mother briefly left him unattended. Overwhelmed by guilt and unable to cope with the tragedy, the 29-year-old software professional died by suicide, leaving behind a note blaming herself for her son's death.

title: 'Minutes away from striking Pak from sea': Navy chief reveals key Op Sindoor moment
content: Indian Navy Chief Admiral Dinesh K Tripathi revealed the Navy was moments from striking Pakistan by sea during Operation Sindoor. Pakistan requested a halt to military actions. The operation, launched after the Pahalgam terror attack, targeted terrorist bases. The Navy's swift deployment and aggressive posture demonstrated its capabilities. Nine major terrorist camps were identified and struck with precision.

title: Anthropic's Boris Cherny, creator of $2.5 billion coding tool ‘clarifies’ Claude Code leak
content: A manual deployment error by Anthropic accidentally exposed the source code of its popular AI coding tool, Claude Code, to the public. The leak revealed internal project codenames and a proactive background agent named KAIROS. Anthropic clarified it was a packaging issue, not a security breach, and is enhancing automation to prevent future incidents. No employees were fired.

title: Mohammed Shami scripts IPL history, sets big record despite LSG defeat
content: Mohammed Shami etched his name in IPL history by taking his fifth first-ball wicket, becoming the first bowler to achieve this feat. Despite his impressive performance, Lucknow Super Giants suffered a six-wicket defeat against Delhi Capitals. Shami, out of the national setup for over a year, reiterated his commitment to playing as long as he enjoys the game.

title: Sanjiv Goenka–Rishabh Pant exchange goes viral after LSG loss, sparks fresh IPL storm
content: Lucknow Super Giants began IPL 2026 with a six-wicket loss to Delhi Capitals, exposing batting frailties as they were bowled out for 141. Owner Sanjiv Goenka's intense on-field discussion with captain Rishabh Pant after the match drew comparisons to a similar incident last season. Pant's decision to open the batting also came under scrutiny following his dismissal for 7.

title: Oracle layoffs: Company sets this severance condition for laid-off employees
content: Oracle has started its largest-ever layoffs, impacting thousands globally. Employees must sign termination documents via DocuSign to receive severance, which appears less generous than competitors.  These cuts, potentially reaching 30,000, aim to fund a massive AI data center expansion, a move that has placed the company under significant financial strain.

title: Trump, Hegseth’s 'back to the Stone Age' threat to Iran draws swift consulate response
content: President Trump warned Iran would be hit "extremely hard" in the coming weeks, aiming to return the nation to the "Stone Age." This aggressive rhetoric follows ongoing hostilities and a shift in US stated goals, drawing sharp criticism from Iran's consulate in Mumbai. The consulate highlighted Iran's ancient heritage, asserting its existing greatness.

title: Artemis II astronauts manually pilot Orion: Nasa video shows spacecraft heading towards Moon
content: Nasa's Orion spacecraft has successfully separated from its rocket during the Artemis II mission. Astronauts are now conducting proximity operations tests. This historic journey marks humanity's return to lunar space after over 50 years. The mission, lasting about 10 days, will see the crew fly around the Moon and capture images of its surface.

title: IPL 2026: LSG vs DC turns into WWE Raw as fan brawl erupts in stands - watch
content: A fan brawl disrupted an IPL 2026 match. Delhi secured a six-wicket victory. The incident in the stands gained widespread attention. Viral footage showed the fight and police intervention. This event became a significant talking point. The match will be remembered for both the game and the disturbance.

title: Amazon cloud operations in Bahrain reportedly damaged in Iran strike
content: Amazon's cloud operations in Bahrain were reportedly damaged following an Iranian strike, with civil defense forces extinguishing a fire at a company facility. This incident follows threats from Iran's Revolutionary Guards against US companies in the Middle East. AWS facilities in the region have faced disruptions amid the ongoing conflict.

title: 'Ramayana' teaser: Ranbir Kapoor debuts as Lord Rama in epic first glimpse
content: The highly anticipated trailer for 'Rama,' a cinematic retelling of the 'Ramayana,' has officially debuted online, showcasing Ranbir Kapoor as Lord Rama. This visual spectacle, unveiled on Hanuman Jayanti, offers glimpses of Rama's life, from his exile to his reign as a crowned king.  The film, a two-part epic, also features Sai Pallavi as Sita and Yash as Ravana.

title: VinFast MPV 7 bookings open in India: Launch date, token amount & more
content: Vietnamese automaker VinFast has opened bookings for its upcoming seven-seater electric MPV, the MPV 7, in India for a Rs 21,000 token. The company also plans to launch a fleet version, an electric cab service, and electric scooters later this year. The MPV 7, expected to rival the Kia Carens Clavis EV, boasts a 201 hp motor and a 60.

title: Bihar man kills pregnant wife over LPG refill money dispute
content: A pregnant woman in Begusarai was allegedly bludgeoned to death with bricks by her husband after an argument over him spending money meant for refilling an LPG cylinder on gambling. The victim, Lakshmi Kumari, was expecting her second child. Her husband, Raj Choudhary, has been arrested.

title: Dallas Cowboys and Kansas City Chiefs linked in bold first-round draft shake-up
content: The Dallas Cowboys are considering a proposed draft trade with the Kansas City Chiefs that would move them from pick No. 20 to No. 29 while gaining extra mid-round selections. The idea boosts depth, especially on defense, but risks missing elite talent. Dallas must decide between immediate impact players or building roster depth.

title: Centre waives duty on key petrochemical goods amid Middle East crisis: Check list
content: Amidst ongoing Middle East energy disruption, the government has announced a complete customs duty exemption on critical petrochemical products until June 30. This temporary measure aims to alleviate supply chain challenges, reduce cost pressures on downstream industries, and ensure the continued availability of essential inputs for various manufacturing sectors.

title: Celtics vs Heat injury update: Who's playing, injured, team stats, and more
content: The Boston Celtics, leading their division, play the Miami Heat at Kaseya Center. Miami needs this win to secure a play-in spot. Both teams have injury concerns. Boston has dominated the season series. The Celtics are favored to win, but Miami's home advantage and determination could make it a close contest.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ mints over Rs 1,460 crore worldwide in 14 days
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has achieved a remarkable Rs 1460 crore gross worldwide in just 14 days. The espionage drama, directed by Aditya Dhar, has garnered Rs 920.02 crore net in India, surpassing its prequel. Despite a slight dip, the film continues its impressive box office run, captivating audiences with its thrilling narrative.

title: Rupee climbs 151 paise to reach 93.19 against US dollar
content: The Indian rupee rebounded strongly, gaining 151 paise to 93.19 against the US dollar after the Reserve Bank capped banks' net open positions. Despite this regulatory intervention, underlying pressures from foreign fund outflows, a firming dollar, and high crude oil prices persist, impacting equity markets as well.

title: 4 dead, 17 injured as tractor-trolley carrying Ram Navami devotees plunges into canal
content: Tragedy struck in Kushinagar as a tractor-trolley carrying devotees to a Ram Navami mela overturned into a canal, claiming four lives and injuring 17. The vehicle reportedly lost control after its hook snapped, plunging into the Gandak canal.  Locals and emergency services rushed to the scene for rescue operations.

title: 'I hated every minute': James Anderson's bombshell remark rocks ECB
content: Veteran fast bowler James Anderson has revealed he "hated every minute" of his experience in The Hundred last year, preferring to focus on his new role as permanent captain at Lancashire. Now 43 and retired from international cricket, Anderson prioritizes the red-ball game, aiming to lead Lancashire back to Division One and rekindle players' love for the sport.

title: To cure son's illness, daughter killed in 'sacrificial ritual'; mother, tantrik held
content: A mother, an occult practitioner, and another man have been arrested in Hazaribag for allegedly strangling a teenage girl during a sacrificial ritual. The mother reportedly believed the ritual was necessary to cure her son's ailments. The girl was killed on March 24 and her body was buried in a garden.

title: Stock market today: NSE Nifty50 tumbles 2%, BSE Sensex sinks over 1,300 points
content: Indian stock markets opened sharply lower on Thursday, mirroring a global downturn. Investor sentiment soured after US President Trump's strong remarks on hitting Iran, escalating geopolitical tensions. This reversed Wednesday's significant gains, where both Sensex and Nifty surged, adding substantial wealth to investors amid hopes of a West Asia conflict resolution.

title: Iran endgame, gas prices, Hormuz crisis & more: Key takeaways from Trump's big address
content: President Trump announced Operation Epic Fury is nearing completion, stating the Iran conflict will end within two to three weeks. He advised nations facing oil crises to purchase from the US or seize oil from the Strait of Hormuz, emphasizing Iran's untrustworthiness and its history of attacks.

title: Cameron Green breaks silence with action after Rahane’s Cricket Australia remark
content: Cameron Green is bowling in the nets for Kolkata Knight Riders. This follows his absence from bowling in the opening match. Cricket Australia clarified he is managing a back issue. Green's return as a bowler is anticipated. His all-round contribution is crucial for KKR's campaign. This development eases early pressure on the team and its significant signing.

title: 'Khalistan will be established soon': Grenade lobbed at Punjab BJP office in Chandigarh — video
content: Two men hurled a hand grenade at the Punjab BJP office in Chandigarh, causing a low-intensity explosion in a parking lot. CCTV footage captured the suspects, and a separatist group claimed responsibility, though police are investigating. The incident has sparked a security alert and political accusations.

title: Hanuman Jayanti: Date, time & significance of Lord Hanuman Janmotsav in 2026
content: Hanuman Jayanti, a major Hindu festival, marks the birth anniversary of Lord Hanuman. Celebrated with great fervor, devotees offer prayers and seek blessings. This year, Hanuman Jayanti falls on April 2, 2026. The day is significant for honoring Lord Hanuman, believed to be an incarnation of Lord Shiva.

title: IPL 2026: DC troll LSG after win as KL Rahul golden duck sparks staircase jibe war
content: A social media spat erupted between Lucknow Super Giants and Delhi Capitals after KL Rahul's golden duck. LSG's subtle jab was met with a sharp retort from DC, highlighting their winning streak. On the field, DC clinched a six-wicket victory, with Sameer Rizvi's unbeaten 70 sealing the win and the banter.

title: A cloak of stars and trail of scars: The dark orbit of 'astrologer' Ashok Kharat
content: Nashik police arrested self-proclaimed godman Ashok Kharat in March 2026 on charges of repeated sexual assault, exploitation, and financial wrongdoing. A cascade of FIRs followed, with over 100 calls reporting various offenses, revealing a widespread alleged exploitation racket. The investigation expanded to include financial crimes and a political storm erupted, leading to resignations and calls for accountability.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for today - check list
content: Top stock market recommendations: Grindwell Norton, Adani Power, and KSB are stocks that Aakash K Hindocha, Deputy Vice President - WM Research of Nuvama Professional Clients Group recommends. He shares target levels as well as his outlook on Nifty and Bank Nifty:

title: PSL in turmoil: Fakhar Zaman challenges PCB in ball-tampering row
content: Fakhar Zaman faces a two-match ban in the Pakistan Super League for allegedly altering the ball's condition. The Pakistan Cricket Board confirmed the punishment. Fakhar denies the charges and has formally challenged the suspension. This incident adds to the Lahore Qalandars' recent off-field issues, including fines for captain Shaheen Shah Afridi and bowler Naseem Shah.

title: Artemis II lifts off, sends four astronauts toward Moon for first time since 1972
content: Nasa's Artemis II mission successfully launched four astronauts into orbit, marking humanity's return to deep space after 54 years. The Orion spacecraft is now en route to the Moon, with the crew conducting vital system checks before their four-day journey. This mission is a crucial step towards establishing a long-term lunar presence and future deep space exploration.

title: 'Buy from US or take it from the Strait': Trump's suggestion to nations hit by oil shock
content: US President Donald Trump offered a solution to countries facing fuel shortages. He advised them to purchase oil from the United States. Alternatively, he suggested they take stronger actions to secure their own supplies. Trump stated Iran's military capabilities have been significantly weakened. This comes as the Middle East crisis continues, impacting global energy flows.

title: Divisional rankings: Grasso, Pyfer elevate their standing in knockout performances
content: the main event pitted two-time former middleweight champion Israel Adesanya against rising Joe Pyfer . he scored a second-round knockout for his fourth straight victory . former women's flyweight champion Alexa Grasso finished fellow top-10 fighter Maycee Barber in the first round .

title: LeBron James confirms breaking driveway backboard vs. Bronny
content: leBron James is first father-son team to record assist to each other . the lakers beat the Brooklyn Nets 116-99 on a one-on-one game . he stuffed the scorebook with 21 points, 10 rebounds and 12 assists .

title: MMA pound-for-pound rankings: Grasso secures her position in women's top 10
content: Grasso entered the bout at no. 10 despite not having won a fight in nearly three years . the former women's flyweight champion remains in the 10th spot . a fighter must have competed over the past 12 months or have an upcoming fight booked .

title: UFL Power Rankings: Which Week 1 winner tops the list, plus each team's MVP
content: a biweekly look at how all eight teams stack up against each other . we've scrapped the MVP acronym this week and dubbed a player from each franchise as the MIPITU: Most important player in the universe .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiling the top 35 QBs
content: the 2024 NFL MVP has finished in the top 10 in passing TDs six seasons in a row and remains a major threat with his legs . despite seeing less passing volume the past two seasons (14th or lower in pass attempts both years), he has finished second among quarterbacks in fantasy points . his 21.4 fantasy points per game in 2025 was actually his lowest since 2019 .

title: Player ratings: Pulisic 3/10 in USMNT's disappointing loss to Portugal
content: the united states lost 2-0 to Portugal in a friendly at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium . the visitors eventually took the lead in the 37th minute when Francisco Trinco slotted a shot past goalkeeper Matt Freese . Mauricio Pochettino and his roster will now begin final prepa .

title: Chris Pronger on Auston Matthews hit, future of NHL Player Safety
content: Chris Pronger has a unique perspective on NHL player safety . he's like an inmate that eventually became a warden at the prison . Pronger was suspended for slashing, high sticking, hitting to the head, kicking and perhaps most infamously stepping on Ryan Kesler with his skate .

title: Draymond Green reflects on his future amid uncertainty in Golden State
content: the Golden State Warriors were two games above .500 but stumbling in the wrong direction . they had lost three of five coming out of the All-Star break . but they built a 17-point first-half lead .

title: 'There's not one path': The unexpected rise of Keaton Wagler at Illinois
content: a hint of exasperation in underwood's voice as he ran through the well-worn tropes about Keaton Wagler . the coach is sensitive to minimizing Wagler's journey, or separating him from the group of freshmen who have taken over the men's college basketball season . underwood: "we found him. He fit us"

title: Why did Browns HC Todd Monken miss the NFL coaches photo? A haircut
content: monken was one of two coaches missing from the NFL's annual coaches photo . the photo was taken immediately after a coaches meeting . monken skipped to receive a fresh cut for the group photo, which was scheduled to be taken at noon .

title: WC final tickets hit $10,990 as FIFA reopens sales
content: the top ticket price for the world cup final was $10,990 . the price had been $8,680 when FIFA sold tickets after the tournament draw in December . tickets were listed for 17 of the 72 group stage matches by Wednesday night .

title: Top newcomers for Notre Dame and every Big Ten team; what coaches, GMs are saying
content: coach Curt Cignetti says he ripped Michigan State transfer Nick Marsh for wearing gold cleats to practice . no conference in 2025 better felt how quality newcomers can reshape rosters like the Big Ten .
